title: Nuclear: Reatomized
body:
Have you ever seen those Nuclear Craft videos and wondered,"Whats it like to be a nuclear engineer"? Well wonder no more! Inspired by the Youtuber, "TheCaptainsTV" this modpack is a collection of the best mods to turn your game into a Nuclear Paradise!

 Please download Optifine here:[https://optifine.net/downloads]
